fn build_string(n: usize) -> String {
    let mut result = String::new();
    for i in 0..n {
        use std::fmt::Write;
        write!(result, "{}", i).unwrap();
    }
    result
}

fn collect_growing(n: usize) -> Vec<u64> {
    let mut result = Vec::with_capacity(n);
    for i in 0..n {
        result.push(i as u64);
    }
    result
}
